## How verified

<!-- Commands you ran. For infra changes, include `modelfactory infra render`
     / `kubectl diff` output proving a clean (no-churn) apply. -->

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` (or `pytest tests/infra tests/jobs`) passes
- [ ] No site-specific/proprietary strings added to the public tree (see CI gate)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
